channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Human Fall Flat – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition now available
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Paid "Upgrade Pack" also available.

Human Fall Flat – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition is now available for $19.99 / £15.99 / €19.99, publisher Curve Games and developer No Brakes Games announced. Users who own the Switch version can upgrade via the “Upgrade Pack” for $4.99/ £3.99 / €4.99.

Human Fall Flat first launched for PC, Mac, and Linux on July 22, 2016, followed by PlayStation 4 on May 9, 2017, Xbox One on May 12, 2017, Switch on December 7, 2017, iOS and Android on June 2, 2019, Xbox Series on May 28, 2021, and PlayStation 5 on June 24, 2021. It has sold over 55 million copies.

“We are delighted to bring Human Fall Flat to the Nintendo Switch 2,” said Curve Games vice president of publishing Rich Keen in a press release. “Players of this enhanced edition will enjoy brilliant new features such as Gamechat and Gameshare, experience five levels previously unavailable to play on Switch and will be kept up-to-date with all new levels as soon as they land on consoles.”

Here is an overview of the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, via Curve Games:

About

The enhanced edition brings the full dose of charm, chaos, and creativity players know and love, now optimized for Nintendo‘s next-generation console.

With the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, players can dive into a delightful mix of five new levels; Dockyard, Museum, Hike, Candyland, and Test Chamber alongside timeless fan-favorites such as Castle, Aztec, and Water.

Plus, all future Human Fall Flat levels will be available as and when they land on consoles, including Steampunk Party, and the newly launched Viking level featuring the eponymous DAVE THE DIVER, which will be available in the near future.

Key Features

  • All current and future levels, from beloved classics to brand-new worlds, will be available as soon as they land on consoles.
  • Tackle puzzles solo, or try the online multiplayer for up to eight players, where teamwork, chaos, and laughter collide.
  • Endless possibilities—players will push, pull, climb, flop, and fumble their way through ingenious puzzles.
  • Play seamlessly using the Nintendo Switch 2 mouse controls for extra accuracy.
  • Gamechat functionality allows players to share audio and video using the built-in gamepad microphone.
  • Gameshare allows players to share the new Nintendo Switch 2 levels with friends on Nintendo Switch.

Watch a new trailer below.

Switch 2 Launch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/human-fall-flat-nintendo-switch-2-edition-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Pokemon Trading Card Game Pocket themed booster pack ‘Mega Shine’ launches March 26
item.content:encoded:
• Smartphone

Featuring Mega Gengar ex, Mega Charizard X ex, and more.

Pokemon Trading Card Game Pocket themed booster pack “Mega Shine” will launch on March 26, The Pokemon Company announced.

The description reads: “In Mega Shine, Shiny Mega Evolution Pokemon ex such as Mega Gengar ex and Mega Charizard X ex will debut!”

Pokemon Trading Card Game Pocket is available now for iOS via App Store and Android via Google Play.

Watch a trailer for the themed booster pack below.

Themed Booster Pack “Mega Shine” Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/pokemon-trading-card-game-pocket-themed-booster-pack-mega-shine-launches-march-26
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: STARBITES launches May 21 in the west
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Science-fiction turn-based RPG dated.

Science-fiction turn-based RPG STARBITES will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam on May 21 in the west, publisher NIS America and developer IKINAGAMES announced.

STARBITES first launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and Switch on October 16, 2025 in Japan.

An $89.99 limited edition is currently available for pre-order via NIS America Online Store, which includes a copy of the game, collector’s box, art book, original soundtrack CD, acrylic stand, set of three rubber keychains, and set of six metal pins.

Here is an overview of the game, via NIS America:

About

Join Lukida and her allies as they uncover the truth beneath the sands of Bitter!

Hop on your Motorbot and ride toward freedom in the brand-new RPG STARBITES! On Bitter, a desert planet ravaged by the aftermath of an interstellar war, a young salvager named Lukida seeks to escape to the stars, but a sudden attack by a giant robot sets events into motion that will change her life—and the fate of Bitter—forever.

Explore the expansive landscape of Bitter atop your Motorbot, and fight your way to victory in a turn-based battle system that’s easy to learn, and satisfying to master. Build up your party, kit out your Motorbots with powerful equipment, and head out into the deserts of Bitter! Somewhere beneath the dunes, the truth of what happened 45 years ago awaits…

Key Features

  • Fracture Your Foes – Learn your enemies’ weaknesses, then Fracture their guard and dish out the damage in classic, turn-based RPG gameplay that’s easy to pick up, and hard to put down. Take extra turns with Driver’s High to really turn the tables!
  • Ride High on your Motorbot – Every character has a personal Motorbot that’s suited to their own personality and battle style. Lukida rides high in her slingshot-wielding robot, while Gwendoll cruises along in her flashy hoverbike.
  • Secrets Beneath the Dunes – The sands of Bitter hide many secrets. Uncover the truth in this gripping story of regret, revenge, and forgiveness.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/starbites-launches-may-21-in-the-west
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Famitsu Sales: 3/9/26 – 3/15/26
item.content:encoded:
• PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Pokemon Pokopia remains on top with 117,029 additional retail sales.

Famitsu has published its estimated physical game software data for Japan for the week of March 9, 2026 to March 15, 2026.

Pokemon Pokopia for Switch 2 remained the highest selling game of the week following its debut the previous week, moving an additional 117,029 retail copies.

The highest selling new release of the week was Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection, which debuted at 37,718 units on Switch 2 and 17,188 units on PlayStation 5 for an opening week total of 54,906 retail copies sold.

The second highest selling new release was FATAL FRAME II: Crimson Butterfly REMAKE, which debuted at 12,115  units on PlayStation 5 and 6,436 units on Switch 2 for an opening week total of 18,551 retail copies sold.

On the hardware side, Switch 2 sold 96,950 units, the Switch family sold 19,941 units, the PlayStation 5 family sold 12,886 units, the Xbox Series family sold 296 units, and the PlayStation 4 family sold 26 units.

Get the full sales charts below.

Software Sales (followed by lifetime sales)

  1. [SW2] Pokemon Pokopia (The Pokemon Company, 03/05/26) – 117,029 (658,400)
  2. [SW2] Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection (Capcom, 03/13/26) – 37,718 (New)
  3. [PS5] Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection (Capcom, 03/13/26) – 17,188 (New)
  4. [PS5] Resident Evil Requiem (Capcom, 02/27/26) – 12,787 (191,619)
  5. [PS5] FATAL FRAME II: Crimson Butterfly REMAKE (Koei Tecmo, 03/12/26) – 12,115 (New)
  6. [SW2] Mario Kart World (Nintendo, 06/05/25) – 8,280 (2,865,062)
  7. [SW2] Mario Tennis Fever (Nintendo, 02/12/26) – 7,311 (83,142)
  8. [SW2] FATAL FRAME II: Crimson Butterfly REMAKE (Koei Tecmo, 03/12/26) – 6,436 (New)
  9. [NSW] Animal Crossing: New Horizons (Nintendo, 03/20/20) – 5,038 (8,402,335)
  10. [SW2] Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (Nintendo, 01/15/26) – 4,535 (88,130)

Rankings 11 to 30 will be announced on March 20.

  1. [PS5] R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos (Granzella, 03/12/26) – (New)
  2. [SW2] R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos (Granzella, 03/12/26) – (New)
  3. [NSW] R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos (Granzella, 03/12/26) – (New)
  4. [SW2] Resident Evil Requiem (Capcom, 02/27/26) –
  5. [SW2] Dragon Quest VII Reimagined (Square Enix, 02/05/26) –
  6. [NSW] Dragon Quest VII Reimagined (Square Enix, 02/05/26) –
  7. [NSW] Minecraft (Microsoft, 06/21/18) –
  8. [SW2] Pokemon Legends: Z-A – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (The Pokemon Company, 10/16/25) –
  9. [NSW] Pokemon Legends: Z-A (The Pokemon Company, 10/16/25) –
  10. [SW2] Super Mario Party Jamboree – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Jamboree TV (Nintendo, 07/24/25) –
  11. [PS5] Tokyo Xtreme Racer (Genki, 02/26/26) –
  12. [SW2] Kirby Air Riders (Nintendo, 11/20/25) –
  13. [NSW] Super Mario Party Jamboree (Nintendo, 10/17/24) –
  14. [NSW] Mario Kart 8 Deluxe (Nintendo, 04/28/17) –
  15. [SW2] Momotaro Dentetsu 2: Anata no Machi mo Kitto Aru – Higashi Nihon Hen + Nishi Nihon Hen – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (Konami, 11/13/25) –
  16. [PS5] Dragon Quest VII Reimagined (Square Enix, 02/05/26) –
  17. [NSW] Nintendo Switch Sports (Nitnendo, 04/29/22)-
  18. [NSW] Momotaro Dentetsu 2: Anata no Machi mo Kitto Aru – Higashi Nihon Hen + Nishi Nihon Hen (Konami, 11/13/25) –
  19. [NSW] Super Smash Bros. Ultimate (Nintendo, 12/07/18) –
  20. [SW2] Donkey Kong Bananza (Nintendo, 07/17/25) –
  21. [PS5] Yakuza Kiwami 3 & Dark Ties (SEGA, 02/12/26) –
  22. [NSW] Tales of Berseria Remastered (Bandai Namco, 02/26/26) –
  23. [NSW] Splatoon 3 (Nintendo, 09/09/22) –
  24. [PS5] Nioh 3 (Koei Tecmo, 02/06/26) –
  25. [NSW] Clubhouse Games: 51 Worldwide Classics (Nintendo, 06/05/20) –
  26. [NSW] Super Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2 (Nintendo, 10/02/25) –
  27. [NSW] Super Mario Odyssey (Nintendo, 10/27/17) –

Hardware Sales (followed by lifetime sales)

  1. Switch 2 – 96,950 (4,804,273)
  2. PlayStation 5 Digital Edition – 8,014 (1,215,775)
  3. Switch OLED Model – 7,813 (9,501,877)
  4. Switch – 7,314 (20,256,142)
  5. Switch Lite – 4,814 (6,889,681)
  6. PlayStation 5 – 2,554 (5,904,185)
  7. PlayStation 5 Pro – 2,318 (333,515)
  8. Xbox Series X – 134 (325,343)
  9. Xbox Series S – 85 (341,370)
  10. Xbox Series X Digital Edition – 77 (28,642)
  11. PlayStation 4 – 26 (7,930,391)


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/famitsu-sales-3-9-26-3-15-26
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Neptunia Unlimited announced for PS5, Switch 2, PS4, and Switch
item.content:encoded:
• PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

The next mainline Neptunia game.

Compile Heart has announced Neptunia Unlimited, the long-awaited next mainline entry in the Neptunia series following Megadimension Neptunia VII, for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and Switch. It will launch on August 27 in Japan for 8,580 yen. The PlayStation 4 version will be digital-only.

A limited edition will also be available for 19,800 yen, which includes a copy of the game, special box with packaging illustration by Tsunako, premium art book, soundtrack CD, the Season Pass, and a Divine Cross promotional card.

Here is an overview of the game, via its official website:

Story

It was the “first meteorite” that signaled the end of the world.

While everything was swallowed up in despair, only one remained—the Goddess Neptune—in the white void.

Guided by a mysterious voice, and with a number etched upon her cheek…

—The mark of another chance to face the end.

Neptune’s “Retry” activates, triggering a cycle of “Endings” and “Beginnings.”

Encounters with new allies and enemies…

Overcoming countless defeats, Neptune and company confront the “True End.”

To save the world from its impending doom, the Goddesses now soar into a new spacetime—!

Characters

  • Neptune / Purple Heart (voiced by Rie Tanaka)
  • Rouge / Red Heart (voiced by Hana Shimano)
  • Ciel / Blue Heart (voiced by Momoka Terasawa)
  • Anna and Lot / Eclipse Heart (voiced by Yukino Nishizono)
  • Noire / Black Heart (voiced by Asami Imai)
  • Blanc / White Heart (voiced by Kana Asumi)
  • Vert / Green Heart (voiced by Rina Satou)

Systems

  • Flying Goddesses – The Goddesses can take flight as they please! Enemies and mechanics unique to the skies will appear. Soar through the skies on a new adventure!
  • End Battles – In End Battles, every Goddess participates! The Goddesses take on an overwhelming battle against a colossal End Boss. By utilizing End Counter Skills, you can block the End Boss’ large-scale special attacks, as well as strike it with powerful attacks.

Watch the announcement trailer, announcement event, and a lyrics video below.

Announce Trailer

Announce Event

Lyrics Video (Short Version): “Muteki no Kizuna -Re:boot & Update-” by Rie Tanaka



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/neptunia-unlimited-announced-for-ps5-switch-2-ps4-and-switch
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
